name: Roasted Tomato Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the broiler.
2. Spray a baking sheet with nonstick cooking spray.
3. Place the tomatoes on the baking sheet, cutside down. Broil until the skins are blistered, about 10 minutes. Set aside to cool.
4. Slip off the skins and chop coarsely.
5. Meanwhile, in a medium-sized saucepan, heat olive oil over medium-low heat.
6. Add onions and sauté for 5 minutes.
7. Add garlic and sauté until the onions are very soft, about 5 minutes longer.
8. Stir in tomatoes and cook, stirring, for 1 minute.
9. Transfer the mixture to a food processor or blender and process until smooth; return to the saucepan.
10. Stir in stock and bring to a boil.
11. Reduce heat to low and simmer for 5 minutes.
12. Remove from heat and stir in basil. Season with salt and pepper.
13. Cover and refrigerate until chilled, at least one hour.
14. The soup can be stored, covered, in the refrigerator for up to 2 days.
